E.C.U Documentation
Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

FrontCamera2014_ECU_3.0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7DC
Recv ID: 7DD
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 62
Func Name: FCAM

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "41464B",
    "soft": "0001",
    "version": "0001"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 44291,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "LDW switch"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 44293,
    "dtctype": 3,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "LDW LED"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 44292,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Virgin or Wrong calibration"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 44290,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Incomplete configuration"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 44295,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "OSP Failure"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 44288,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Internal failure"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 44289,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Over heat"
  }
]
